text: Hello. Hello. Hello. Good afternoon. This is Rachel, so I'm calling because there are pending grocery and cash benefits worth up to $300 available on your Medicare account through Oregon State Relief Program. So far, have you received any updates or notifications about this yet? No, because I'm not old enough. Sorry, but you did not seem to qualify for the plans that we have. Exactly. So have a great day.
